MAPPING.DESCRIPTION:
This mapping adjusts the effective-to date of the historical record in the event of a new record getting inserted because of a Type2 changed being noted in the preceding load process of the Type2 dimension table W_EMPLOYEE_D. Moreover, if any Type1 changes happened, this mapping can also update all the historical records with that change, if configured to behave like that.
There is no update strategy transformation used in this mapping. The session-side parameter "Treat source rows as" will be set to "Update" to take care of this.
MAPPING.NAME: SIL_EmployeeDimension_SCDUpdate

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: This filter transformation stops the most recent (current) record from being processed. Since the data set was ordered descending on natural keys, datasource_num_id and effective_from_dt, the most recent (current) record will always be the first one, and hence, get the REC_NUMBER value = 1.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Fil_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Scd_Update

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION:
This expression transformation assigns new values to the Type1 columns (based on the parameter value of $$UPDATE_ALL_HISTORY) as well as stamps the correct values of EFFECTIVE_TO_DT and the CURRENT_FLG for historical records.
This is a 'group' operation and each 'group' is formed by concatenating columns like: INTEGRATION_ID || '~' || TO_CHAR(DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Exp_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Scd_Update

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION:
This SQL override gets the non-history-tracking columns as well as a few of the system columns from the Type2 dimension table W_EMPLOYEE_D. For each set of natural key (INTEGRATION_ID) and DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, the following logic is used to identify the actual records to be selected:
For the records that were touched in the preceeding load process, did they have history ?
If not (like the case when a simple Type1 change might have occured), the record is not selected.
If it did have history and we need to update all historical records (per mapping parameter $$UPDATE_ALL_HISTORY) with the Type1 changes that might have happened today, all the historic
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: Sq_W_EMPLOYEE_D

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column stores the date from which the source record (in the Source system) is effective. The value is extracted from the source (whenever available)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: SRC_EFF_FROM_DT

TRANSFORMFIELD.DESCRIPTION: This column stores the date up to which the source record (in the Source system) is effective. The value is extracted from the source (whenever available)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: SRC_EFF_TO_DT

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT $$Hint1 TARGET_TABLE.ROW_WID, TARGET_TABLE.FST_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MID_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.LAST_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.PREV_LAST_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.FULL_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.INDV_TITLE, TARGET_TABLE.NAME_PREFIX, TARGET_TABLE.NAME_SUFFIX, TARGET_TABLE.NAME_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.BIRTH_DT, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_OF_BIRTH, TARGET_TABLE.W_SEX_MF_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.W_SEX_MF_DESC, TARGET_TABLE.ST_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.CITY, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTY, TARGET_TABLE.STATE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.STATE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.STATE_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.ZIPCODE, TARGET_TABLE.POST_OFFICE_BOX, TARGET_TABLE.ADDR_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_ST_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_CITY, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTY, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_STATE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_STATE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_STATE_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTRY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTRY_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_ZIPCODE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_POST_OFFICE_BOX, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_ADDR_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ST_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_CITY, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTY, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ZIPCODE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_POST_OFFICE_BOX, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ADDR_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.ALTERNATE_EMAIL_ADDR, TARGET_TABLE.WEB_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_FORMED_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_HIRE_DT, TARGET_TABLE.ORIG_HIRE_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.ADJ_SERVICE_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERMIT_ST_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERMIT_END_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.CONTRACT_ST_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.CONTRACT_END_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.EMPLOYEE_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.ALT_EMP_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.APPLICANT_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.CONTINGENT_WORKER_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.DEPARTMENT_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.DEPARTMENT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.POSITION_TYPE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.POSITION_TYPE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.JOB_CATEGORY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.JOB_CATEGORY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MARITAL_STAT_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.MARITAL_STAT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_HELD_POSTN, TARGET_TABLE.PR_POSTN, TARGET_TABLE.SPOUSE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_TYPE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_TYPE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.W_ETHNIC_GRP_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.W_ETHNIC_GRP_DESC, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERM_TYPE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERM_TYPE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.NATIVE_LANG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.NATIVE_LANG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.SEC_FLU_LANG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.SEC_FLU_LANG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.THR_FLU_LANG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.THR_FLU_LANG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.W_VETERAN_STATUS_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.W_VETERAN_STATUS_DESC, TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_CURCY_CD, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_BU_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_LOC, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_WID, TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_BU_ID, TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_POS_ID, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.W_UPDATE_DT, TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.ETL_PROC_WID, TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.X_CUSTOM, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_TO_DT , TARGET_TABLE.CHANGED_ON_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D TARGET_TABLE, (SELECT SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D SCD_OUTER, (SELECT DELTA_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, DELTA_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D DELTA_OUTER WHERE DELTA_OUTER.ETL_PROC_WID = $$ETL_PROC_WID ) DELTA_TABLE WHERE SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID = DELTA_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID AND SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DELTA_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID GROUP BY SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) SCD_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = SCD_HISTORY.INTEGRATION_ID AND TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SCD_HISTORY.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG = (CASE WHEN '$$UDATE_ALL_HISTORY' = 'Y' THEN CURRENT_FLG ELSE 'Y' END) $$Hint2 ORDER BY TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT DESC

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This filter transformation stops the most recent (current) record from being processed. Since the data set was ordered descending on natural keys, datasource_num_id and effective_from_dt, the most recent (current) record will always be the first one, and hence, get the REC_NUMBER value = 1.
INSTANCE.NAME: Fil_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Scd_Update

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION:
This expression transformation assigns new values to the Type1 columns (based on the parameter value of $$UPDATE_ALL_HISTORY) as well as stamps the correct values of EFFECTIVE_TO_DT and the CURRENT_FLG for historical records.
This is a 'group' operation and each 'group' is formed by concatenating columns like: INTEGRATION_ID || '~' || TO_CHAR(DATASOURCE_NUM_ID)
INSTANCE.NAME: Exp_W_EMPLOYEE_D_Scd_Update

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION:
This SQL override gets the non-history-tracking columns as well as a few of the system columns from the Type2 dimension table W_EMPLOYEE_D. For each set of natural key (INTEGRATION_ID) and DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, the following logic is used to identify the actual records to be selected:
For the records that were touched in the preceeding load process, did they have history ?
If not (like the case when a simple Type1 change might have occured), the record is not selected.
If it did have history and we need to update all historical records (per mapping parameter $$UPDATE_ALL_HISTORY) with the Type1 changes that might have happened today, all the historic
INSTANCE.NAME: Sq_W_EMPLOYEE_D

METADATAEXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: The target data model version that this mapping is designed to load
METADATAEXTENSION.NAME: OLAP_Version

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT $$Hint1 TARGET_TABLE.ROW_WID, TARGET_TABLE.FST_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MID_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.LAST_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.PREV_LAST_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.FULL_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.INDV_TITLE, TARGET_TABLE.NAME_PREFIX, TARGET_TABLE.NAME_SUFFIX, TARGET_TABLE.NAME_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.BIRTH_DT, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_OF_BIRTH, TARGET_TABLE.W_SEX_MF_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.W_SEX_MF_DESC, TARGET_TABLE.ST_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.CITY, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTY, TARGET_TABLE.STATE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.STATE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.STATE_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.COUNTRY_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.ZIPCODE, TARGET_TABLE.POST_OFFICE_BOX, TARGET_TABLE.ADDR_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_ST_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_CITY, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTY, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_STATE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_STATE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_STATE_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTRY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTRY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_COUNTRY_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_ZIPCODE, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_POST_OFFICE_BOX, TARGET_TABLE.MAIL_ADDR_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ST_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_CITY, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTY, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_STATE_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_COUNTRY_REGION, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ZIPCODE, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_POST_OFFICE_BOX, TARGET_TABLE.WORK_ADDR_EFF_DATE, TARGET_TABLE.ALTERNATE_EMAIL_ADDR, TARGET_TABLE.WEB_ADDRESS, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_FORMED_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_HIRE_DT, TARGET_TABLE.ORIG_HIRE_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.ADJ_SERVICE_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERMIT_ST_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERMIT_END_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.CONTRACT_ST_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.CONTRACT_END_DT_WID, TARGET_TABLE.EMPLOYEE_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.ALT_EMP_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.APPLICANT_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.CONTINGENT_WORKER_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.DEPARTMENT_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.DEPARTMENT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.POSITION_TYPE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.POSITION_TYPE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.JOB_CATEGORY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.JOB_CATEGORY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.MARITAL_STAT_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.MARITAL_STAT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_HELD_POSTN, TARGET_TABLE.PR_POSTN, TARGET_TABLE.SPOUSE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_NUM, TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_TYPE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.NATNL_ID_TYPE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.W_ETHNIC_GRP_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.W_ETHNIC_GRP_DESC, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERM_TYPE_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.WRK_PERM_TYPE_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.NATIVE_LANG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.NATIVE_LANG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.SEC_FLU_LANG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.SEC_FLU_LANG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.THR_FLU_LANG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.THR_FLU_LANG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.W_VETERAN_STATUS_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.W_VETERAN_STATUS_DESC, TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.DISABILITY_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.EDUCATION_BCKGND_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.HIEST_EDU_DEG_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.RELIGION_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_CURCY_CD, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_CODE, TARGET_TABLE.APPR_AUTH_CAT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_BU_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_LOC, TARGET_TABLE.EMP_ACCNT_NAME, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.PAR_DEMOG_WID, TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_BU_ID, TARGET_TABLE.VIS_PR_POS_ID, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.EFFECTIVE_TO_DT, TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG, TARGET_TABLE.W_UPDATE_DT, TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.ETL_PROC_WID, TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.X_CUSTOM, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_TO_DT, TARGET_TABLE.CHANGED_ON_DT FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D TARGET_TABLE, (SELECT SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D SCD_OUTER, (SELECT DELTA_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, DELTA_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID FROM W_EMPLOYEE_D DELTA_OUTER WHERE DELTA_OUTER.ETL_PROC_WID = $$ETL_PROC_WID AND DELTA_OUTER.DELETE_FLG = 'N' ) DELTA_TABLE WHERE SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID = DELTA_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID AND SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = DELTA_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND SCD_OUTER.DELETE_FLG = 'N' GROUP BY SCD_OUTER.INTEGRATION_ID, SCD_OUTER.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) SCD_HISTORY WHERE TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = SCD_HISTORY.INTEGRATION_ID AND TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID = SCD_HISTORY.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID AND TARGET_TABLE.DELETE_FLG = 'N' AND TARGET_TABLE.CURRENT_FLG = (CASE WHEN '$$UDATE_ALL_HISTORY' = 'Y' THEN CURRENT_FLG ELSE 'Y' END) $$Hint2 --AND TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID = '665406' ORDER BY TARGET_TABLE.INTEGRATION_ID, TARGET_TABLE.DATASOURCE_NUM_ID, TARGET_TABLE.SRC_EFF_FROM_DT DESC

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SIL_EmployeeDimension_SCDUpdate.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SIL_EmployeeDimension_SCDUpdate.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $SIL_EmployeeDimension_SCDUpdate.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub
